---
title: "Plot Follicle"
params:
  sample: "default"
  path: "."
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
import spatialdata
import spatialdata_plot
# import session_info  # not in current container
from timer import timer, timing_summary

with timer("Setup"):
    with open("params.json") as f:
        params = json.load(f)

    sample = params["sample"]
    cell_id = Path(params["path"]).stem
    # 'path' is the staged follicle-level zarr produced by subset_follicle.
    zarr_path = params["path"]
```

## Load follicle SpatialData

Reads the follicle-level zarr store created by notebook 02 for this cell.

```{python}
with timer("Read zarr"):
    sdata = spatialdata.read_zarr(zarr_path)
sdata
```

## Available images

Lists all image elements present in the follicle zarr store. Xenium data typically
includes a morphology focus image and a maximum intensity projection.

```{python}
with timer("List images"):
    image_keys = list(sdata.images.keys())
print(f"Images: {image_keys}")
```

## Plot each channel

Renders every channel of every image element on its own with `spatialdata-plot`.

```{python}
import numpy as np
from matplotlib.colors import Normalize

for img_key in image_keys:
    img = sdata.images[img_key]
    arr = next(iter(img.children.values())).image if hasattr(img, "children") else img
    for ch in arr.coords["c"].values:
        with timer(f"Plot {img_key}[{ch}]"):
            vmin, vmax = np.percentile(np.asarray(arr.sel(c=ch)), [1, 99.5])
            (
                sdata.pl
                .render_images(
                    element=img_key, channel=ch, cmap="gray",
                    norm=Normalize(vmin=vmin, vmax=vmax),
                )
                .pl.show(title=f"{sample} — {img_key} — {ch}", figsize=(6, 6))
            )
```

## Timings

```{python}
timing_summary()
```

## Session Info

```{python}
# session_info.show()  # not in current container
```
